title: Roasted Jerusalem Artichoke Soup
description: A creamy and comforting soup made with roasted Jerusalem artichokes. Serve with a swirl of turkish yogurt for added creaminess.
instructions: Peel and chop the Jerusalem artichokes into 1-inch pieces.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 25-30 minutes, or until tender.
Sauté the garlic in a large pot until fragrant.
Add the roasted artichokes, chicken broth, and heavy cream.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Purée with an immersion blender or regular blender.
Stir in turkish yogurt and serve hot.
